modules.module_title: Quality Control, Customer Service & Basic Diagnostics

questions.question: Workshop mein kaam karte samay sabse zaroori PPE (Personal Protective Equipment) kya hai?

options.B: Headphones

questions.explanation: Safety Goggles aankhon ko sparks, dust aur chemical splashes se bachane ke liye sabse zaroori PPE hai.

questions.question: Fire Extinguisher ka istemal karne se pehle kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Expiry date aur pressure gauge

questions.explanation: Fire Extinguisher ki expiry date aur pressure gauge check karna zaroori hai taaki emergency mein woh sahi se kaam kare.

questions.question: Denting ke liye kaun sa tool metal ko stretch ya shrink karne mein help karta hai?

options.B: Hammer aur Dolly

questions.explanation: Hammer aur Dolly ka combination denting mein metal ko reshape aur repair karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Electrical tools use karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Loose cables aur damaged insulation check karna

questions.explanation: Loose cables aur damaged insulation electrical shock ka reason ban sakte hain, isliye unko check karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Workshop mein chemical spills hone par kya action lena chahiye?

options.B: Turant clean karna aur proper disposal karna
options.D: Kisi aur ko clean karne ke liye kehna

questions.explanation: Chemical spills ko turant clean karna aur unka proper disposal karna safety ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Power Sander use karte samay kya pehenna zaroori hai?

options.B: Sunglasses

questions.explanation: Power Sander se nikalne wali dust aur particles se bachne ke liye Dust Mask aur Safety Goggles pehenna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Welding karte samay kaun si light rays aankhon ke liye sabse dangerous hoti hain?

options.B: Visible light

questions.explanation: Welding arc se nikalne wali Infrared aur Ultraviolet rays aankhon ko serious damage de sakti hain, isliye welding helmet zaroori hai.

questions.question: Ek body file ka primary use kya hai?

options.B: Metal surface ko smooth karna aur high spots detect karna

questions.explanation: Body file metal surface ko smooth karne aur high spots (metal ke ubhre hue hisse) ko detect karne ke liye use hoti hai.

questions.question: Workshop mein oil ya grease spills hone par kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Turant absorbent material se clean karna

questions.explanation: Oil ya grease spills slip hazards create karte hain, isliye unhe turant absorbent material (jaise saw dust) se clean karna chahiye.

questions.question: Air Compressor use karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Pressure release valve ko block karna
options.B: Proper ventilation ensure karna aur pressure limits check karna
options.C: Bina ear protection ke use karna

questions.explanation: Air compressor ko safe tarike se operate karne ke liye proper ventilation aur pressure limits ka dhyan rakhna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Jack stands ka kya purpose hai jab car ko lift kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Car ko move karna

questions.explanation: Jack stands car ko lift karne ke baad usko stable support provide karte hain, jisse safety badhti hai.

questions.question: Paint booth mein kaam karte samay proper ventilation kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Paint fumes ko remove karne aur fresh air provide karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Paint fumes toxic hote hain, isliye proper ventilation unhe remove karta hai aur technician ko fresh air deta hai.

questions.question: Hacksaw ka primary use kya hai?

options.B: Metal cut karna

questions.explanation: Hacksaw metal parts ko cut karne ke liye design kiya gaya hai.

questions.question: Rust remover chemicals use karte samay kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.B: Proper ventilation aur skin protection (gloves) ka use karna

questions.explanation: Rust remover chemicals corrosive hote hain, isliye proper ventilation aur skin protection zaroori hai.

questions.question: Angle grinder use karte samay safety guard ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Sparks aur debris ko user se door rakhna

questions.explanation: Safety guard sparks, metal particles aur debris ko user ki taraf aane se rokta hai, accident ka risk kam karta hai.

questions.question: SDS (Safety Data Sheet) kya provide karta hai?

options.B: Chemical products ki safety information

questions.explanation: SDS chemical products ke hazards, safe handling, storage aur emergency procedures ke baare mein detailed information deta hai.

questions.question: Compressor air lines mein moisture trap kyun lagaya jaata hai?

options.B: Paint mein moisture aane se rokne ke liye
options.D: Air flow regulate karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Moisture trap compressed air se pani aur oil ko remove karta hai, jisse paint defects jaise fisheyes aur poor adhesion se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Denting repair mein 'On-Dolly' hammering technique ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Hammer aur dolly ek hi point par hit karte hain
options.B: Hammer aur dolly alag-alag points par hit karte hain

questions.explanation: On-Dolly hammering mein hammer aur dolly metal ke ek hi point par hit karte hain, jisse metal ko shape mein wapas laya jaata hai.

questions.question: Body filler apply karne se pehle surface ko clean aur rough kyun kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Filler ko zyada dikhane ke liye
options.B: Filler ki better adhesion ke liye

questions.explanation: Clean aur rough surface filler ko achhe se pakadne mein help karta hai, jisse woh utarta nahi hai.

questions.question: Shrinking metal ka kya purpose hai denting mein?

options.B: Stretched metal ko original shape mein wapas laana

questions.explanation: Accident mein metal stretch ho jaata hai. Shrinking metal usko heat karke aur cool karke original shape mein wapas laata hai.

questions.question: Body filler ko mix karte samay hardener ki sahi quantity kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Sahi curing aur strength ke liye

questions.explanation: Hardener ki sahi quantity body filler ko properly cure hone aur strong banne ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Minor dents ko remove karne ke liye kaun sa tool sabse common hai?

options.B: Dent puller (suction/glue type)

questions.explanation: Minor dents ko paint damage kiye bina remove karne ke liye suction ya glue type dent pullers use kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Panel alignment check karne ke liye kya dekha jaata hai?

options.B: Panel gaps aur flushness

questions.explanation: Panel alignment mein adjoining panels ke beech ke gaps aur unki flushness (ek level par hona) check ki jaati hai.

questions.question: Agar body panel mein rust ho, toh usse kaise treat karna chahiye?

options.B: Rust ko grind karke remove karna aur rust converter/primer use karna

questions.explanation: Rust ko properly remove karke aur anti-rust treatment lagana zaroori hai, warna rust paint ke neeche se wapas aa jaayega.

questions.question: Denting ke baad surface par 'pinholes' kyun appear hote hain?

options.B: Body filler mein air bubbles trap hone se
options.D: Surface ko zyada smooth karne se

questions.explanation: Body filler ko mix karte samay ya apply karte samay air bubbles trap ho sakte hain, jo sand karne par pinholes ban jaate hain.

questions.question: Paintless Dent Repair (PDR) technique ka kya benefit hai?

options.B: Original paint intact rehta hai aur time kam lagta hai
options.C: Sirf bade dents ke liye hai
options.D: Hamesha welding ki zaroorat padti hai

questions.explanation: PDR mein dents ko special tools se push ya pull karke repair kiya jaata hai, jisse original paint intact rehta hai aur time/cost save hota hai.

questions.question: Body filler ko sand karne ke liye kaun sa grit sandpaper pehle use karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Rough sanding ke liye P80 jaise coarse grit sandpaper ka istemal kiya jaata hai, taaki excess filler jaldi remove ho.

questions.question: Metal shrinking ke liye heat gun ke alawa aur kya use kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Hair dryer

questions.explanation: Blow torch ka use metal ko localised heat provide karne ke liye kiya jaata hai, jisse metal shrink hota hai. Lekin isse carefully use karna chahiye.

questions.question: Agar ek panel severely damaged hai aur repairable nahi hai, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Us par aur zyada filler lagana
options.B: Panel ko replace karna

questions.explanation: Severely damaged panel ko replace karna hi best option hota hai, taaki structural integrity aur finish maintain rahe.

questions.question: Panel bonding adhesive ka kya fayda hai over traditional welding in some cases?

options.B: Rust resistance aur vibration dampening provide karta hai
options.C: Sirf plastic panels ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Panel bonding adhesives weld ke compare mein rust resistance badhate hain aur vibrations ko absorb karte hain, but proper application technique zaroori hai.

questions.question: Dent repair ke baad surface ko smooth karne ke liye kaun sa block use hota hai?

options.B: Rubber sanding block

questions.explanation: Rubber sanding block sandpaper ko evenly press karta hai surface par, jisse smooth aur flat finish milti hai.

questions.question: Body filler ki curing time kis factor par depend karti hai?

options.B: Ambient temperature aur hardener ki quantity

questions.explanation: Ambient temperature aur hardener ki sahi quantity body filler ki curing time ko directly affect karti hai.

questions.question: 'Feather edging' kya hai dent repair mein?

options.B: Repair area ke edges ko smooth aur gradual banana

questions.explanation: Feather edging mein repair area ke edges ko gradually sand kiya jaata hai, taaki paint transition smooth ho aur repair dikhe nahi.

questions.question: Agar ek dent sharp aur deep hai, toh usse repair karne ka sabse effective method kya hai?

options.B: Hammering, dolly work, aur body filler ka combination

questions.explanation: Sharp aur deep dents ko properly repair karne ke liye hammering, dolly work aur body filler ka sahi istemal zaroori hai.

questions.question: Paint karne se pehle surface ko degrease kyun kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Oil, grease aur wax ko remove karne ke liye, jisse paint adhesion improve ho
options.C: Surface ko thanda karne ke liye
options.D: Paint ko dilute karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Degreasing se surface par maujood oil, grease aur wax remove hote hain, jisse paint surface par achhe se chipakta hai.

questions.question: Masking tape aur paper ka kya use hai painting mein?

options.B: Unwanted areas ko paint se bachana

questions.explanation: Masking tape aur paper use karke hum un parts ko cover karte hain jin par paint nahi karna hai, jaise windows, trims, etc.

questions.question: Sanding ke liye sahi grit sequence follow karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Zyada sandpaper use karne ke liye
options.B: Previous grit ke scratches ko remove karne aur smooth finish achieve karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Sahi grit sequence (coarse se fine) follow karne se previous grit ke scratches remove hote hain aur surface paint ke liye ready hoti hai.

questions.question: Etch primer ka kya purpose hai?

options.A: Sirf plastic par use hota hai
options.B: Bare metal par excellent adhesion provide karna aur rust ko prevent karna

questions.explanation: Etch primer bare metal par use hota hai, jo chemical etching se strong adhesion banata hai aur rust formation ko rokta hai.

questions.question: Agar surface par old paint mein minor scratches hain, toh unhe kaise prepare karna chahiye painting se pehle?

options.B: Wet sanding se smooth karna aur fine grit sandpaper use karna
options.C: Sirf dry cloth se saaf karna

questions.explanation: Minor scratches ko wet sanding aur fine grit sandpaper se smooth karke prepare kiya jaata hai, taaki naya paint evenly apply ho.

questions.question: Surfacer primer ka primary role kya hai?

options.B: Minor surface imperfections ko fill karna aur smooth foundation provide karna

questions.explanation: Surfacer primer minor scratches, pinholes aur imperfections ko fill karta hai, jisse paint ke liye ek smooth aur uniform surface milti hai.

questions.question: Masking tape ko remove karne ka best time kya hai?

options.A: Paint ke poori tarah dry hone ke baad
options.B: Paint ke thoda tacky hone par, lekin poori tarah dry hone se pehle

questions.explanation: Masking tape ko paint ke thoda tacky hone par remove karna chahiye. Agar paint poora dry ho gaya toh edges sharp nahi banenge, aur agar zyada wet hai toh paint smear ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar car body par silicone contamination hai, toh kya paint defect ho sakta hai?

options.B: Fisheyes ya craters

questions.explanation: Silicone contamination paint ko repell karta hai, jisse surface par fisheyes ya craters ban jaate hain.

questions.question: Epoxy primer ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Sirf show cars ke liye hai
options.B: Excellent corrosion resistance aur adhesion provide karta hai

questions.explanation: Epoxy primer apni excellent corrosion resistance aur strong adhesion properties ke liye jaana jaata hai, especially on bare metal.

questions.question: Sanding karte samay dust ko control karne ka ek tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Dry sanding ke bajaye wet sanding karna

questions.explanation: Wet sanding dust ko air mein failne se rokta hai aur ek smoother finish bhi deta hai.

questions.question: Plastic parts par primer lagane se pehle kya karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Unhe special plastic adhesion promoter se treat karna

questions.explanation: Plastic surfaces par paint ki achhi adhesion ke liye plastic adhesion promoter spray karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar repair area mein old paint ke sharp edges hain, toh kya defect ho sakta hai?

options.B: Paint 'ringing' ya 'witness lines' dikh sakti hain

questions.explanation: Sharp edges ko feather edge na karne par naye paint ke neeche se old paint ki boundary dikh sakti hai, jise ringing kehte hain.

questions.question: Pre-paint cleaner ka kya role hai?

options.B: Surface se remaining contaminants (dust, fingerprints) ko remove karna

questions.explanation: Pre-paint cleaner painting se just pehle use hota hai, taaki surface par koi bhi microscopic contaminant na rahe.

questions.question: Agar primer mein curing issues aa rahe hain, toh kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Improper mixing ratio of hardener

questions.explanation: Improper mixing ratio, bahut zyada thinner, ya kam ambient temperature primer ki curing ko negatively affect kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Scuff pad ka kya use hai surface preparation mein?

options.B: Surface ko matte finish dena aur adhesion ke liye micro-scratches create karna

questions.explanation: Scuff pad old paint ya clear coat par microscopic scratches banata hai, jisse naye paint ki adhesion better hoti hai.

questions.question: Metal ke exposed areas par primer lagana kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Corrosion se bachane aur paint ki adhesion badhane ke liye
options.C: Surface ko garam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Primer exposed metal ko rust se protect karta hai aur topcoat ke liye ek uniform base provide karta hai.

questions.question: Tack cloth ka kya use hai painting se just pehle?

options.B: Surface se loose dust aur lint particles ko pick up karna

questions.explanation: Tack cloth ek sticky cloth hota hai jo surface se microscopic dust aur lint ko pick up karta hai, taaki paint mein koi particle na fas jaye.

questions.question: HVLP (High Volume Low Pressure) spray gun ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: High transfer efficiency aur kam overspray
options.C: Sirf water-based paints ke liye hai

questions.explanation: HVLP spray guns paint ko low pressure par spray karte hain, jisse paint target surface par zyada chipakta hai aur kam waste hota hai.

questions.question: Paint mix karte samay sahi mixing ratio follow karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Paint ko sasta banane ke liye
options.B: Sahi curing, durability aur finish ke liye
options.C: Paint ko zyada shiny banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Sahi mixing ratio (paint, hardener, reducer) paint ki curing, durability aur final finish ke liye critical hai.

questions.question: Clearcoat ka kya purpose hai auto painting mein?

options.B: Basecoat ko UV rays, scratches aur weather se protect karna aur gloss dena

questions.explanation: Clearcoat ek transparent protective layer hoti hai jo basecoat ko protect karti hai aur deep glossy finish deti hai.

questions.question: Spray gun ko surface se kitni door rakhna chahiye paint karte samay?

options.B: Manufacturer ke recommendations ke according (usually 6-8 inches)

questions.explanation: Sahi distance maintain karna zaroori hai taaki paint evenly apply ho aur runs/sags ya dry spray na ho.

questions.question: Agar paint application mein 'orange peel' effect aa raha hai, toh kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Improper gun settings, wrong paint viscosity ya incorrect application technique

questions.explanation: Orange peel paint surface ka rough aur bumpy hona hai, jo galat gun settings, paint viscosity ya application technique se ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Paint booth mein temperature aur humidity control kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Technician ko comfortable rakhne ke liye
options.B: Paint ki proper drying, curing aur finish ke liye

questions.explanation: Correct temperature aur humidity paint ki drying aur curing process ko optimize karte hain, jisse paint defects kam hote hain.

questions.question: Basecoat paint ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Car ko color aur metallic/pearl effect dena

questions.explanation: Basecoat paint car ko uska desired color aur special effects (jaise metallic flakes) deta hai.

questions.question: Spray gun ko clean karna kyun zaroori hai har use ke baad?

options.A: Zyada paint waste karne ke liye
options.B: Nozzle clogging se bachne aur consistent spray pattern maintain karne ke liye
options.C: Spray gun ko chamkane ke liye

questions.explanation: Regular cleaning spray gun ko proper working condition mein rakhta hai, jisse quality paint job possible hoti hai.

questions.question: Paint 'runs' ya 'sags' kis wajah se hote hain?

options.B: Zyada paint apply karne se, gun ko bohat slow move karne se ya surface ke bohat close hone se

questions.explanation: Runs aur sags tab hote hain jab paint ki quantity surface par itni zyada ho jaati hai ki woh gravity ki wajah se neeche flow karta hai.

questions.question: Paint application mein 'overlap' technique ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Paint ko ek hi jagah par lagana
options.B: Har pass mein previous pass ke 50-75% area ko cover karna
options.D: Sirf ek hi pass mein paint karna

questions.explanation: Consistent overlap se paint evenly distribute hota hai aur streaking ya uneven coverage se bacha ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar paint gun ka spray pattern uneven hai, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Nozzle, air cap aur fluid tip ki cleanliness aur damage

questions.explanation: Clogged ya damaged nozzle, air cap ya fluid tip uneven spray patterns ka common reason hote hain.

questions.question: Water-based paints (waterborne) use karne ka kya fayda hai over solvent-based paints?

options.B: Kam VOC emissions aur environment friendly
options.D: Sirf black color mein available hain

questions.explanation: Water-based paints mein Volatile Organic Compounds (VOCs) kam hote hain, jo environment aur technician ki health ke liye better hain.

questions.question: Paint gun mein air pressure adjust karne ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Spray pattern aur atomization ko control karna

questions.explanation: Sahi air pressure paint particles ko fine droplets mein atomize karta hai aur desired spray pattern banata hai.

questions.question: Spot repair mein blending technique ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Naye paint ko old paint ke saath seamlessly mix karna
options.D: Sirf white cars ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Blending technique naye paint ko surrounding old paint mein gradually mix karti hai, jisse repair area dikhta nahi hai.

questions.question: Two-stage paint system mein kaun si layers hoti hain?

options.B: Basecoat aur Clearcoat

questions.explanation: Two-stage system mein pehle color (basecoat) apply hota hai, phir us par transparent protective layer (clearcoat) lagayi jaati hai.

questions.question: Agar paint application mein 'dry spray' ho raha hai, toh kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.A: Gun surface ke bohat close hai
options.B: Gun surface se bohat door hai, paint viscosity high hai ya air pressure bohat zyada hai

questions.explanation: Dry spray tab hota hai jab paint particles surface tak pahunchne se pehle hi dry ho jaate hain, jisse rough, grainy finish milti hai.

questions.question: Paint gun cleaning ke liye kaun sa solvent use karna chahiye?

options.B: Paint manufacturer dwara recommended cleaning solvent

questions.explanation: Sahi cleaning solvent paint gun ko bina damage kiye clean karta hai aur uski life badhata hai.

questions.question: Paint defect 'fisheyes' kis wajah se hote hain?

options.B: Surface par oil, grease ya silicone contamination

questions.explanation: Fisheyes surface par maujood contaminants ki wajah se hote hain, jo paint ko repell karte hain.

questions.question: Agar paint mein 'runs' aa gaye hain, toh unhe kaise correct kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Dry hone ke baad carefully sand karke aur polish karke

questions.explanation: Runs ko dry hone ke baad carefully sand karke aur polish karke remove kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Color matching ke liye 'spray-out card' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Test panel par paint spray karke color match check karna

questions.explanation: Spray-out card par paint spray karke original car ke paint se compare kiya jaata hai, taaki perfect color match mil sake.

questions.question: Paint defect 'orange peel' ko kaise correct kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Wet sanding aur buffing/polishing se

questions.explanation: Orange peel ko fine grit wet sanding se smooth karke aur phir buffing/polishing se restore kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Buffing machine use karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: High speed par kaam karna
options.C: Surface ko overheat hone se bachana aur consistent movement rakhna

questions.explanation: Surface ko overheat karne se paint burn ho sakta hai, isliye consistent movement aur moderate pressure zaroori hai.

questions.question: Paint defect 'blistering' ka kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Moisture trap hona ya improper surface preparation

questions.explanation: Blistering tab hota hai jab paint ke neeche moisture ya air trap ho jaati hai, ya surface properly prepare nahi hoti.

questions.question: Color matching mein 'tinting' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Base paint mein small amounts of other colors add karke exact match banana

questions.explanation: Tinting ek skilled process hai jismein different pigments ko carefully mix karke desired shade achieve kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Compounding ka kya purpose hai after painting?

options.B: Minor surface defects, swirl marks aur light scratches ko remove karna

questions.explanation: Compounding ek abrasive process hai jo paint surface se imperfections ko remove karta hai aur gloss restore karta hai.

questions.question: Agar buffing ke baad surface par 'holograms' ya 'swirl marks' dikh rahe hain, toh kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.A: Sahi technique aur product use na karna
options.B: Bohat kam pressure lagana
options.C: Bohat slow speed par kaam karna

questions.explanation: Holograms improper buffing technique, wrong pad ya compound selection ki wajah se hote hain.

questions.question: Paint repair ke baad final inspection mein kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Color match, paint finish, defects ki absence aur panel alignment

questions.explanation: Final inspection mein quality aur customer satisfaction ensure karne ke liye sabhi aspects ko carefully check kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Polishing ka kya purpose hai after compounding?

options.B: Micro-scratches ko refine karna aur deep gloss lana

questions.explanation: Polishing compounding ke baad use hota hai, jo remaining fine scratches ko remove karta hai aur paint ko mirror-like finish deta hai.

questions.question: Agar paint ka color original se thoda light ya dark aa raha hai, toh yeh kis defect mein aata hai?

options.B: Color mismatch

questions.explanation: Color mismatch tab hota hai jab naya paint original paint ke shade se match nahi karta.

questions.question: Paint defect 'cracking' ka kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Paint ki excessive thickness, improper curing ya old paint ki flexibility loss

questions.explanation: Cracking paint system mein stress ki wajah se hoti hai, jo thickness, curing ya substrate ki movement se related ho sakta hai.

questions.question: IR (Infrared) curing lamps ka kya fayda hai paint drying mein?

options.B: Fast aur efficient drying, especially spot repairs ke liye
options.C: Sirf winters mein use hote hain

questions.explanation: IR lamps paint ko andar se cure karte hain, jisse drying time kam hota hai aur finish quality improve hoti hai.

questions.question: Paint ko protect karne aur uski shine maintain karne ke liye kya recommend kiya jaata hai after repair?

options.B: Us par paani daalna

questions.explanation: Waxing ya ceramic coating paint ko environmental elements se protect karti hai aur uski gloss ko maintain rakhti hai.

questions.question: Agar ek metallic paint repair ke baad 'mottling' dikh raha hai, toh kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Metallic particles ka uneven distribution ya improper spray technique

questions.explanation: Mottling metallic paint mein uneven ya patchy appearance hota hai, jo metallic flakes ke galat alignment ki wajah se hota hai.

questions.question: Customer ko repair process ke baare mein inform karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Trust build karne aur expectations manage karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Transparent communication customer satisfaction ke liye critical hai, jisse unhe process aur timeline ki clear understanding milti hai.

questions.question: Repair estimate banate samay kin factors ko consider kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Damage ki extent, required parts, labor cost aur paint materials

questions.explanation: Sahi estimate ke liye damage assessment, parts cost, labor time aur paint/materials ki cost ko calculate kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Quality control check mein kya include hota hai after a denting & painting job?

options.B: Panel alignment, paint finish, color match, aur functionality of repaired parts

questions.explanation: Comprehensive quality check se ensure hota hai ki repair highest standards ke according hua hai aur customer satisfied hai.

questions.question: Agar customer repair ke baad kisi minor defect ki complaint karta hai, toh kya response hona chahiye?

options.B: Complaint ko sunna, investigate karna aur solution offer karna

questions.explanation: Customer complaints ko professionally handle karna good customer service ka part hai aur business ki reputation banata hai.

questions.question: Workshop waste (paint cans, thinners, body filler residue) ka proper disposal kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Environmental pollution aur health hazards se bachne ke liye

questions.explanation: Hazardous waste ka proper disposal environmental regulations ko follow karta hai aur health risks ko kam karta hai.

questions.question: Agar car ke sensor (parking sensor) ko panel repair ke liye remove karna pade, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Carefully remove karna, store karna aur repair ke baad properly reinstall karna

questions.explanation: Modern cars mein sensors aur electronics hote hain, jinhe carefully handle karna zaroori hai taaki unki functionality intact rahe.

questions.question: Job card ya repair order ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Repair details, parts used, labor hours aur customer instructions ko document karna

questions.explanation: Job card ek official record hota hai jo repair process ki transparency aur accountability maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Agar ek technician ko kisi repair technique mein doubt hai, toh usse kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Senior technician se consult karna ya training manual refer karna

questions.explanation: Proper guidance lene se mistakes avoid hoti hain aur quality work ensure hota hai.

questions.question: Customer ko delivery se pehle repaired car ko clean karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf car ko chamkane ke liye
options.B: Professional image maintain karne aur customer satisfaction badhane ke liye
options.C: Paint ko dry karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Clean car deliver karna workshop ki professionalism ko darshata hai aur customer ko achha experience deta hai.

questions.question: Teamwork ka kya importance hai ek busy workshop mein?

options.B: Work efficiency badhane, tasks distribute karne aur knowledge share karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Teamwork se work flow smooth hota hai, deadlines meet hoti hain aur overall productivity badhti hai.

questions.question: Agar car ke headlight ya taillight ko remove karna pade repair ke liye, toh kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Carefully remove karna, wiring disconnect karna aur safe jagah store karna

questions.explanation: Lights expensive components hote hain aur unki wiring bhi delicate hoti hai, isliye careful handling zaroori hai.

questions.question: Ek professional denting & painting technician mein kaun si quality honi chahiye?

options.B: Attention to detail, problem-solving skills aur good communication

questions.explanation: Detailing, problem-solving aur communication skills ek successful technician ke liye essential hain.

questions.question: Agar car repair ke baad electric window kaam nahi kar rahi hai, toh kya check karna chahiye pehle?

options.B: Wiring connections, fuse aur switch

questions.explanation: Denting ya painting ke dauran wiring ya electrical components disturb ho sakte hain, isliye unhe check karna chahiye.

questions.question: Customer feedback lena kyun important hai?

options.B: Service quality improve karne aur future business ke liye
options.D: Negative comments ko ignore karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Customer feedback valuable insights provide karta hai jisse services ko aur behtar banaya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Repair area mein dust particles minimize karne ke liye kya steps lene chahiye?

options.B: Paint booth ko clean rakhna, tack cloth use karna aur proper air filtration

questions.explanation: Dust-free environment paint defects ko rokta hai aur high-quality finish ensure karta hai.

questions.question: Agar car ki door handle ko remove karna pade, toh uske reinstallation mein kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Sahi alignment, screws tight karna aur functionality check karna

questions.explanation: Door handle ki proper reinstallation uski functionality aur aesthetics ke liye essential hai.
